about.title: About Us
about.slogan1: Enjoy everything in its own time!
about.slogan2: Sports experience, Hungarian and international food specialties in one place.
about.description: Győr's most popular sports bar is waiting for you. Be our guest for a delicious lunch or dinner! Cheer for your favorite team with us at the next game!
